case_title: JUAN LOPEZ VS. SFO SHUTTLE BUS COMPANY et al

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF DISMISSAL AND POS FILED BY DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO PARKING, INC. DBA SFO SHUTTLE BUS COMPANY (SUED AS SFO SHUTTLE BUS COMPANY)
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO PARKING, INC. DBA SFO SHUTTLE BUS COMPANY (SUED AS SFO SHUTTLE BUS COMPANY)

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LOPEZ, JUAN AS TO DEFENDANT SFO SHUTTLE BUS COMPANY KULI, MELEKIOLA FAKATAVA DOES 1 THROUGH 20, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR FEB-05-2010 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-09-2009 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JAN-21-2010
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF FEB-05-2010 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
